LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-21-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS RUSTIN FOX AND GABRIELE SANTI'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
